text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Qalibaf: Some think we destroyed them, but that's not true, but in this war, we are the winners on the ground. Certainly, equipment and money are important in war, but they are not always effective. They had these but lacked the power to use them. We succeeded in asymmetric warfare. America's first slogan has become 'Israel first. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Qalibaf: In the previous war, we were vulnerable regarding the launchers, but not in this war 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Qalibaf: In the technical field, we hit about 180 drones, which we did not have such capability in air defense in the previous war. All these events have happened in a few months. Hitting the F-35 is not an accident; with the missile that exploded near that plane (F-35), the enemy understood what capability we have and which direction we are heading. Of course, it should be said that they were seeking a ceasefire. We also accepted it to achieve our rights. Our main goal should be to pursue the rights of the nation within this framework. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Speaker of Iranian Parliament General Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf in his address to Iranian people: - We have not destroyed the enemy, but we definitely have the upper hand on the field because the US and the Zionist regime have not achieved their goals - Certainly, in the third imposed war, in the offensive and defensive fields, we are stronger than before, and we saw it on the battlefield. - Today, our people are more active than in the previous war; it has now been nearly 50 nights that they have been on the streets every day. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Zionist soldiers interrogated a young Palestinian, then ordered him to keep walking then shooting him in the back, for sport. This was not the first time these genocidal Zionists used the same sick method: ordering defenseless Palestinians to walk away, then shooting them for fun.
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义士兵审问了一名年轻的巴勒斯坦人，然后命令他继续行走，随后从背后射杀了他，以此为乐。这并不是这些种族灭绝的犹太复国主义者第一次使用这种病态的方法：命令手无寸铁的巴勒斯坦人走开，然后为了取乐而射杀他们。

text: Trump posted a video of Frank Sinatra performing “My Way”. “And now, the end is near / And so I face the final curtain… Regrets, I’ve had a few / But then again, too few to mention… I did it my way.”

text: 🐻 Grab a coffee and read all the key news of the past 24 hours : ➡️ Belarusian President Lukashenko states that he always knows which side he is on ➡️ The IRGC intelligence service arrested members of espionage cells from the USA, Israel, and the UK ➡️ Russia develops a unique anti-drone net ➡️ China has filed a formal protest with Japan after the destroyer JS Ikazuchi transited the Taiwan Strait ➡️ Sergei Lavrov comments on the terrible situation with energy in Europe , explains Russia's position on red lines , and says that negotiations with Ukraine isn't their top priority ➡️ Brazilian President da Silva has criticised Donald Trump ➡️ A transformer exploded in Kiev, causing power outages ➡️ India expressed deep concern to Iran over firing on Indian merchant ships in Strait of Hormuz ➡️ Iranian Parliament Speaker announces that Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz , explains why they included Lebanon in the ceasefire , and says the US was definitely the one wanting a ceasefire . He also reveals if the Islamabad talks have led to anything ➡️ Mass protests continue in Ireland over soaring fuel prices ➡️ Italian Deputy Prime Minister Matteo Salvini has called for resuming Russian gas imports ➡️ Maria Zakharova explains that most people are not aware of the number of people the USSR lost during WW2 ➡️ Trump praises Israel for being a great ally 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 喝杯咖啡，阅读过去24小时的所有关键新闻：➡️ 白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科表示，他始终知道自己站在哪一边 ➡️ 伊斯兰革命卫队情报部门逮捕了来自美国、以色列和英国的间谍小组成员 ➡️ 俄罗斯开发了一种独特的反无人机网 ➡️ 在日本“雷”号驱逐舰穿越台湾海峡后，中国向日本提出了正式抗议 ➡️ 谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫评论了欧洲糟糕的能源状况，解释了俄罗斯在红线问题上的立场，并表示与乌克兰的谈判不是他们的首要任务 ➡️ 巴西总统达席尔瓦批评了唐纳德·特朗普 ➡️ 基辅一个变压器爆炸，导致停电 ➡️ 印度就霍尔木兹海峡向印度商船开火一事向伊朗表示深切关注 ➡️ 伊朗议会议长宣布伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，解释了他们为何将黎巴嫩纳入停火协议，并表示美国绝对是想要停火的一方。他还透露了伊斯兰堡的会谈是否取得了任何成果 ➡️ 爱尔兰因燃料价格飙升继续举行大规模抗议活动 ➡️ 意大利副总理马泰奥·萨尔维尼呼吁恢复俄罗斯天然气进口 ➡️ 玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃解释说，大多数人并不知道苏联在二战中损失的人数 ➡️ 特朗普称赞以色列是一个伟大的盟友 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇧🇬 Bulgaria is voting in a parliamentary election with former president Rumen Radev leading polls at around 35%, well ahead of the GERB party. Radev has called for closer ties with Russia and an end to political instability, while voters remain focused on corruption and rising living costs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇧🇬 保加利亚正在进行议会选举，前总统鲁门·拉德夫在民调中以约35%的支持率领先，遥遥领先于保加利亚公民党（GERB）。拉德夫呼吁与俄罗斯建立更紧密的关系并结束政治不稳定，而选民们仍然关注腐败和不断上涨的生活成本。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. President Trump furiously yelled at his aides when he was informed that a U.S. fighter jet had been shot down, ordering the military to go get the missing pilots immediatley. However, aides kept Trump out of the room during the search and rescue operation believing that his impatience would be unhelpful. The fear of putting troops in harms way has loomed over Trump's head. It is the primarly reason he resisted an operation to capture Kharg island, which he was told would be successful, but feared it would lead to unacceptably high U.S. casualties. He said the troops would be sitting ducks. U.S. officials are confident a deal can be reached soon, eyeing further talks in Pakistan. A White House official explained Trump's 'Praise be to Allah' post was Trump trying to seem as unstable an insulting as possible to bring the Iranians to the negotiating table. While Trump was sold on the war by Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and discussions with top allies such as Sen. Lindsey Graham, the U.S. public was not. Depsite being shown poor polling numbers for the midterms, Trump believed that this was an opportunity to change the world order in a way he couldn't in his first term. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国总统特朗普在得知一架美国战斗机被击落后，愤怒地对助手大吼大叫，命令军方立即去营救失踪的飞行员。然而，助手们在搜救行动期间将特朗普挡在房间外，认为他的急躁无济于事。让部队陷入危险的恐惧一直笼罩在特朗普心头。这是他抵制夺取哈尔克岛行动的主要原因，尽管有人告诉他该行动会成功，但他担心这会导致美国伤亡过高。他说部队会成为活靶子。美国官员相信很快就能达成协议，并着眼于在巴基斯坦进行进一步会谈。一位白宫官员解释说，特朗普发布“赞美真主”的帖子是为了让他看起来尽可能不稳定和具有侮辱性，从而迫使伊朗人回到谈判桌前。虽然以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和与林赛·格雷厄姆参议员等高级盟友的讨论让特朗普相信了战争的必要性，但美国公众并不买账。尽管中期选举的民调数据不佳，但特朗普认为这是一个改变世界秩序的机会，这是他在第一个任期内无法做到的。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 A Israeli reservist soldier, Barak Kalphon, 48, from Adi, has died from wounds sustained in southern Lebanon yesterday. He was a fighter in the 7056 battalion of the 226th reserve paratrooper brigade. The incident occurred around 11:30am while…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF anounced that Sgt. First Class Lidor Porat was killed during operational activity near the village of Kila, close to Metula along the Lebanese border. Forces from Brigade 769 were operating along the front defence line to remove threats to northern Israel when an engineering D9 vehicle from Battalion 7106 struck an explosive device planted by Hezbollah, killing one, seriously injuring four and lightly injuring another four. The IDF said it is still investigating when the explosive device was placed and whether the incident constitutes a violation of the ceasefire arrangements. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 一名来自阿迪（Adi）、48岁的以色列预备役士兵巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalphon）因昨天在黎巴嫩南部受的伤而死亡。他是第226预备役伞兵旅第7056营的战士。事件发生在上午11:30左右，当时……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，一级中士利多尔·波拉特（Lidor Porat）在黎巴嫩边境梅图拉（Metula）附近的基拉（Kila）村附近执行行动时丧生。第769旅的部队当时正在前线防线执行任务，以消除对以色列北部的威胁，此时第7106营的一辆D9工程车撞上了真主党埋设的爆炸装置，造成一人死亡，四人重伤，另有四人轻伤。以色列国防军表示，目前仍在调查爆炸装置是何时放置的，以及该事件是否构成了对停火协议的违反。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor I just paid about $20 for 4 burger patties, and it's about to go even higher. Trump: "We're raising tariffs very soon" https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045684054549217585/video/1 - unusual_whales tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says passage for all commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz is “completely open” for the remaining period of the ceasefire. He states vessels are to use the coordinated route already announced by Iran’s…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 WSJ: Iran’s hard-line factions have intensified their influence over decision-making, complicating efforts to maintain a consistent position in negotiations with the United States. A recent reversal over the status of the Strait of Hormuz exposed divisions between Iran’s diplomatic leadership and military elements, particularly the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, which was angry Foreign Minister Araghchi didn't coordinate with them before announcing the opening of the Strait. The anger from the IRGC was expressed almost immeidatley. That night a message from someone identifying them as a member of the IRGC Navy broadcast a radio message relaying that the Strait would remain closed. “We will open it by the order of our leader, Imam Khamenei, not by the tweets of some idiot." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希表示，在停火期间的剩余时间内，所有商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道是‘完全开放’的。他声明，船只应使用伊朗方面已经宣布的协调航线……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：伊朗强硬派势力加强了对决策的影响力，使维持与美国谈判立场一致的努力变得复杂。最近关于霍尔木兹海峡地位的立场反转，暴露了伊朗外交领导层与军事部门（特别是伊斯兰革命卫队）之间的分歧。伊斯兰革命卫队对外交部长阿拉格希在宣布开放海峡前未与他们协调感到愤怒。伊斯兰革命卫队的愤怒几乎立即表现出来。当晚，一名自称是伊斯兰革命卫队海军成员的人通过无线电广播传达了一条消息，称海峡将保持关闭。“我们将根据我们的领袖哈梅内伊伊玛目的命令开放它，而不是根据某个白痴的推文。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender Photos posted by U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) show Sailors and Marines onboard the USS Rushmore (LSD-47), a Whidbey Island-class dock landing ship operating with the Tripoli Amphibious Ready Group in the Arabian Sea, supporting the enforcement of the ongoing blockade off the coast of Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布的照片显示，美国海军拉什莫尔号（USS Rushmore, LSD-47）上的水手和海军陆战队员正在阿拉伯海与的黎波里号两栖戒备群（Tripoli Amphibious Ready Group）协同行动，支持执行伊朗海岸外的持续封锁任务。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @Acyn : Buttigieg: Maybe when you see the president insult your faith by depicting himself as the risen Lord, healing somebody, you’ve got something to say about that. Especially since, after insulting your faith by circulating that image, he turned around and insulted your intelligence by saying he thought that was a picture of him being a doctor. By the way, he’s not a doctor either. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @Acyn : 布蒂吉格：也许当你看到总统把自己描绘成复活的主、治愈他人来侮辱你的信仰时，你会有话要说。特别是考虑到在通过传播那张图片侮辱了你的信仰之后，他又转过头来声称他以为那是一张他作为医生的照片，以此来侮辱你的智商。顺便说一句，他也不是医生。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains Iran's rejection of the U.S.'s 15 point plan. "When the infrastructure is destroyed here, what kind of infrastructure will be destroyed? What kind of infrastructure will be destroyed in places that the…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf says that Iran seeks a lasting peace agreement so that the conflict will not restart again. "In the three-way negotiations, we emphasised on the fact that the U.S. is truly unreliable. I mean, it is completely unreliable. This is a clear statement, a clear discussion. We emphasised on the topics that they discussed. There are still a few topics that are controversial. They have their own views on the matter. They have their own views on the issue of poverty and so on. We have our own views on the matter. Of course, a negotiation without a doubt, the essence of a negotiation is that both parties reach an agreement. But, in reality, what was essential for us was the unreliability of the point that I pointed out. We are determined to have a stable peace. We are determined to have a stable peace that will not be repeated twice. The U.S. and the regime, especially the regime, in the past 80 years have been at war, ceasefire, and peace. If you recall, this has happened twice in the past year. This has to be suppressed by force. The first step is to have a stable peace and to have a guarantee that it will not be repeated. Neither the Zionist regime nor the U.S. These are the elements that we have to pursue. And, in reality, this victory that we have is the summary of what we have done." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了伊朗拒绝美国15点计划的原因。“当这里的基础设施被摧毁时，什么样的基础设施会被摧毁？在那些……的地方，什么样的基础设施会被摧毁？” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，伊朗寻求达成一项持久的和平协议，以确保冲突不会再次爆发。“在三方谈判中，我们强调了美国确实不可信这一事实。我的意思是，它完全不可信。这是一个明确的声明，一场明确的讨论。我们强调了他们讨论的话题。仍然有一些话题存在争议。他们对这个问题有自己的看法。他们对贫困等问题有自己的看法。我们对这个问题有自己的看法。当然，毫无疑问，谈判的本质是双方达成协议。但是，实际上，对我们来说至关重要的是我指出的那一点——不可靠性。我们决心实现持久和平。我们决心实现一个不会重演两次的持久和平。美国和该政权，特别是该政权，在过去80年里一直处于战争、停火和和平的状态。如果你还记得的话，这种情况在过去一年里已经发生了两次。这必须通过武力来制止。第一步是实现持久和平，并确保它不会重演。无论是犹太复国主义政权还是美国。这些是我们必须追求的要素。而且，实际上，我们取得的这场胜利是我们所做工作的总结。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 "Whether people like Israel or not, they have proven to be a GREAT Ally of the United States of America. They are Courageous, Bold, Loyal, and Smart and, unlike others that have shown their true colors in a moment of conflict and stress, Israel fights hard, and knows how to WIN!" - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “无论人们是否喜欢以色列，他们都已证明自己是美利坚合众国伟大的盟友。他们勇敢、大胆、忠诚且聪明，而且与那些在冲突和压力时刻露出真面目的国家不同，以色列奋力拼搏，并且懂得如何赢得胜利！” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains how the U.S. was defeated because it failed to achieve its goals. "In this section, look at why we say we are successful. Look at what the enemy's goal was. If the enemy didn't reach its goal, it would…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains Iran's rejection of the U.S.'s 15 point plan. "When the infrastructure is destroyed here, what kind of infrastructure will be destroyed? What kind of infrastructure will be destroyed in places that the Americans have settled in the region? And now when we hit, the countries of the region will be affected. If our oil wells are destroyed, there should be no oil left. When the infrastructure is destroyed, we should not use it. Why should the Americans use it? Why should they say that they will destroy the oil wells and take all the oil? This is natural. These threats have become ineffective. At this time, we were not even talking about negotiations. He also proposed a 15-point plan. The 15-point plan was officially sent to us by Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister, the commander of the army there. He sent this plan to us. In fact, the UN Security Council discussed these issues. Naturally, all of this was transferred to the Commander-in-Chief. At that moment, it was reflected. A decision was made. It was decided that the 10-point plan should be adopted. It was our view that our demands, our goals, and the rights of the people were reflected in this 10-point plan. We did not say this to the Americans. We said this to Pakistan. In fact, we said that this is our word. We do not accept the 15-point plan. Our word is the 10-point plan. If the Americans have something to say about the 10-point plan, it is negotiable. We have not spoken to the Americans yet. They spoke to the Americans who were in the Middle East. They said that the Americans have to make a non-financial proposal. We insisted on our 10-point plan. We said that this is our view. If we want to be in this framework, we have to be in this framework. They then agreed to talk about this. They said that in order to start this, we have to give a temporary ceasefire. One of the important people was there. I do not want to be a part of their meeting. They agreed to this. Now that they are insisting on this, they say that there are three or four days left to finish this. In some places, our views have not been met. We have not accepted this clearly. But at the same time, we said to the people of Pakistan in the Middle East that we will not give up." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了美国为何因未能实现其目标而战败。“在这一部分，看看为什么我们说我们是成功的。看看敌人的目标是什么。如果敌人没有达到目标，它就会……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了伊朗拒绝美国15点计划的原因。“当这里的基础设施被摧毁时，什么样的基础设施会被摧毁？在美国人在该地区定居的地方，什么样的基础设施会被摧毁？现在当我们进行打击时，该地区的国家将会受到影响。如果我们的油井被摧毁，就不应该剩下石油。当基础设施被摧毁时，我们不应该使用它。为什么美国人要使用它？他们为什么要说他们会摧毁油井并夺走所有的石油？这是自然的。这些威胁已经变得无效。当时，我们甚至没有谈论谈判。他还提出了一个15点计划。这份15点计划是由巴基斯坦副总理、该国军队指挥官正式发送给我们的。他把这个计划发给了我们。事实上，联合国安理会讨论了这些问题。自然地，所有这些都被转达给了总司令。在那一刻，它得到了反映。做出了一个决定。决定采纳10点计划。我们的观点是，我们的要求、我们的目标和人民的权利都反映在这10点计划中。我们没有对美国人说这些。我们对巴基斯坦说了这些。事实上，我们说这就是我们的话。我们不接受15点计划。我们的话是10点计划。如果美国人对10点计划有什么要说的，那是可以协商的。我们还没有和美国人谈过。他们和在中东的美国人谈了。他们说美国人必须提出一个非财务性的建议。我们坚持我们的10点计划。我们说这就是我们的观点。如果我们想在这个框架内，我们就必须在这个框架内。他们随后同意谈论这个问题。他们说为了开始这个，我们必须给予临时停火。其中一个重要人物在那里。我不想成为他们会议的一部分。他们同意了这一点。现在他们坚持这一点，他们说距离结束还有三四天的时间。在某些地方，我们的观点没有得到满足。我们没有明确接受这一点。但与此同时，我们对中东的巴基斯坦人民说，我们不会放弃。” @wfwitness

They are Courageous, Bold, Loyal, and Smart and, unlike others that have shown their true colors in a moment of conflict and stress, Israel fights hard, and knows how to WIN! President DJT @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇯🇵🇰🇵🇰🇷🇺🇸 Japanese PM Sanae Takaichi on North Korean missile test earlier today: At around 06:00 today, what may be multiple ballistic missiles were launched from North Korea. The items that may be ballistic missiles are believed to have already fallen…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇵 U.S. Indo-Pacific Command on North Korea missile launch earlier today: The Democratic People’s Republic of Korea launched multiple ballistic missiles on April 19, 2026. We are aware of the missile launches and are consulting closely with our allies and partners. Based on current assessments, this event does not pose an immediate threat to U.S. personnel or territory, or to our allies. The United States remains committed to the defense of the U.S. homeland and our allies in the region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇯🇵🇰🇵🇰🇷🇺🇸 日本首相高市早苗谈及今天早些时候的朝鲜导弹试验：今天大约06:00，朝鲜发射了可能是多枚弹道导弹。据信可能是弹道导弹的物体已经坠落……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇵 美国印太司令部谈及今天早些时候的朝鲜导弹发射：朝鲜民主主义人民共和国于2026年4月19日发射了多枚弹道导弹。我们已知悉此次导弹发射，并正在与我们的盟友和伙伴密切磋商。根据目前的评估，此次事件对美国人员或领土，或对我们的盟友不构成直接威胁。美国仍然致力于保卫美国本土和我们在该地区的盟友。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf said that after Iran shot down the F-15, the U.S. understood Iran's capabilities. It is worth noting for context that Iranian state media claims the downed F-15 was an F-35. "I would like to say that in this…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explains how the U.S. was defeated because it failed to achieve its goals. "In this section, look at why we say we are successful. Look at what the enemy's goal was. If the enemy didn't reach its goal, it would have been defeated. We didn't attack, it attacked. It had a goal. It wanted to surrender Iran. It took two to three days. How many days is it today? We fought for more than 40 days. Now we have 10 days to cease fire. But in those 40 days, we were forced to cease fire. So it couldn't surrender us. It wanted to suppress the regime. It couldn't suppress it. It thought Iran was like Venezuela. It would act like Venezuela. Four days later, it would say, We took the oil from Iran. Whoever wants to take oil from us, should take it from the Persian Gulf. This was its goal. This was its third goal. In the first days, it would say, With the bombardment that I will make, I will destroy all the missiles in Iran. As time went by, look at the accuracy of our fire. It didn't happen. No matter how much it bombed, it couldn't take our people away from us. We had said before that it wouldn't happen. We were even vulnerable in the launchers. This time, you saw, the power of our fire, the diversity of our fire was found. In Isfahan, there was a situation, worse than the situation in Tabas. It had decided, from the western and eastern borders, against the revolution, it would say, I gave weapons to a few of them. They would attack us and capture us there. No matter how hard it tried, it didn't succeed. It was looking for internal clues. Before the war and after the war. We saw this. It couldn't do it. It decided to attack the ground. It couldn't do it. It came to the Hormuz strait, to say that it would occupy this place. It invited the world, but no one answered. It invited NATO, but no one answered. It came to do it, but no one answered. It is clear that we are winning in this battle. They admit it, the enemy admits it, our friends admit it. Ideas and hopes are everywhere. But look, this is very different from saying that we destroyed their army." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，在伊朗击落F-15战机后，美国了解了伊朗的能力。值得注意的是，伊朗官方媒体声称被击落的F-15实际上是一架F-35。‘我想说的是，在这一点上……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释了美国为何因未能实现目标而战败。“在这一部分，看看为什么我们说我们是成功的。看看敌人的目标是什么。如果敌人没有达到目标，它就是失败了。我们没有进攻，是它进攻了。它有一个目标。它想让伊朗投降。它以为需要两到三天。今天是多少天了？我们战斗了40多天。现在我们还有10天停火。但在那40天里，我们被迫停火。所以它没能让我们投降。它想镇压政权。它没能镇压。它以为伊朗就像委内瑞拉。它会像对待委内瑞拉那样行事。四天后，它会说，我们从伊朗拿走了石油。谁想从我们这里拿走石油，就应该从波斯湾拿走。这就是它的目标。这是它的第三个目标。在最初的几天里，它会说，通过我的轰炸，我将摧毁伊朗所有的导弹。随着时间的推移，看看我们火力的准确性。这并没有发生。无论它轰炸多少次，它都无法将我们的人民从我们身边夺走。我们之前说过这不会发生。我们甚至在发射装置上很脆弱。这一次，你们看到了，我们的火力力量，我们火力的多样性被发现了。在伊斯法罕，情况比塔巴斯的情况更糟。它决定从西部和东部边界对抗革命，它会说，我给了他们中的一些人武器。他们会攻击我们并在那里俘虏我们。无论它怎么努力，都没有成功。它在寻找内部线索。战前和战后。我们看到了这一点。它做不到。它决定进行地面攻击。它做不到。它来到霍尔木兹海峡，声称要占领这个地方。它邀请了全世界，但没有人回应。它邀请了北约，但没有人回应。它想这样做，但没有人回应。很明显，我们在这场战斗中正在获胜。他们承认这一点，敌人承认这一点，我们的朋友也承认这一点。思想和希望无处不在。但看，这与说我们摧毁了他们的军队有很大不同。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "Sailors and Marines aboard dock landing ship USS Rushmore (LSD 47) conduct blockade operations in the Arabian Sea." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045656782308040803/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）：“登上船坞登陆舰拉什莫尔号（LSD 47）的水手和海军陆战队员在阿拉伯海执行封锁行动。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045656782308040803/photo/1 推文

text: 🇷🇺 "In various regions of the world, I had conversations with different representatives, enlightened, educated people occupying not the last positions in their countries. I made terrible discoveries: they did not know at all that the Soviet Union lost 27 million people, of which no less than 14 to 16 million were civilians." — Russian FM spokesperson Maria Zakharova 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “在世界各地，我与不同国家的代表、受过良好教育且身居要职的人士进行了交谈。我有了可怕的发现：他们根本不知道苏联损失了2700万人，其中至少有1400万到1600万是平民。” —— 俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf says that the U.S. has failed to achieve the goals it set out to achieve. “You have done this, we have given our opinion, if the United States is after this, the Trump tweet must announce that it has a request…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf said that after Iran shot down the F-15, the U.S. understood Iran's capabilities. It is worth noting for context that Iranian state media claims the downed F-15 was an F-35. "I would like to say that in this war, as I have explained before, that if a war were to take place, I would be asked many times, what is special and what is common, and I have pointed out in my second lecture that if a war were to take place, we would be in our master's position. Everyone would be in a low position, everyone would be in a high position. And most importantly, we are definitely stronger than the past. And today, our enemy would not have believed this, but today, we have seen this in the field. Today, our people are purer than they were. And you will see that now, about 50 nights, these people are on the streets every day. This means that our armed forces, our capacity, in the field of art, you can see, we have hit about 170 to 180 targets. In the past, we did not have this kind of capability in the field of art. You can see that all the events took place in our mind. Yes, yes. You can see that now is not the time. I would like to say that what a miracle of a revolution, and what a strength of a great leader, in the midst of an unprecedented war, and in the midst of scientific progress, everyone saw this. The enemy itself observed this. Anyway, hitting F-35s is not a coincidence. It is not a coincidence. This is a struggle in a variety of dimensions. The capabilities of art, the capabilities of design, I do not want to say anything here. Those who understand, will understand what I am saying. If you saw that the missile that exploded near our airfield, I will not talk about the art of this, it exploded, you will understand what this capability means, and which direction we are going. So, I would like to say, from the first war to the second war, which took place eight or nine months apart, and this war actually took place twice, this design, this event took place, and these capabilities were shown." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，美国未能实现其设定的目标。“你们已经这样做了，我们已经发表了意见，如果美国追求这一点，特朗普的推文必须宣布它有一个请求……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示，在伊朗击落F-15战机后，美国了解了伊朗的能力。值得注意的是，伊朗官方媒体声称被击落的F-15实际上是F-35。“我想说的是，在这场战争中，正如我之前解释的那样，如果发生战争，我会被多次问到，什么是特殊的，什么是共同的，我在第二次讲座中指出，如果发生战争，我们将处于主导地位。每个人都会处于低位，每个人都会处于高位。最重要的是，我们绝对比过去更强大。今天，我们的敌人不会相信这一点，但今天，我们在实地看到了这一点。今天，我们的人民比过去更纯洁。你会看到，现在大约50个夜晚，这些人每天都在街上。这意味着我们的武装部队，我们的能力，在艺术领域，你可以看到，我们已经打击了大约170到180个目标。过去，我们在艺术领域没有这种能力。你可以看到所有事件都发生在我们的脑海中。是的，是的。你可以看到现在不是时候。我想说的是，革命的奇迹是什么，伟大领袖的力量是什么，在史无前例的战争中，在科学进步中，每个人都看到了这一点。敌人自己也观察到了这一点。无论如何，击中F-35并非巧合。这不是巧合。这是一场多维度的斗争。艺术的能力，设计的能力，我不想在这里多说什么。懂的人自然会明白我在说什么。如果你看到在我们机场附近爆炸的导弹，我不会谈论它的艺术性，它爆炸了，你就会明白这种能力意味着什么，以及我们正朝着哪个方向前进。所以，我想说，从第一次战争到第二次战争，相隔八九个月，这场战争实际上发生了两次，这个设计，这个事件发生了，这些能力也展现了出来。” @wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command Sailors and Marines aboard dock landing ship USS Rushmore (LSD 47) conduct blockade operations in the Arabian Sea. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045655554308124747/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部的海军水手和海军陆战队员在拉什莫尔号船坞登陆舰（LSD 47）上在阿拉伯海执行封锁行动。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045655554308124747/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. intelligence and military officials estimate that Iran still maintains about 40% of its pre-war arsenal of long-range attack drones, as well as 60% of its ballistic and cruise missile launchers, with over 100 systems that were buried inside caves and bunkers as a result of U.S. and Israeli strikes having been recovered since the start of the two-week ceasefire on April 8. In addition, some American estimates assess that Iran could reclaim as much as 70% of its pre-war stockpile of missiles, similarly buried in rubble from attacks on its bunkers and depots, officials tell The New York Times. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国情报和军事官员估计，伊朗仍保留了其战前约 40% 的远程攻击无人机库存，以及 60% 的弹道导弹和巡航导弹发射装置。自 4 月 8 日两周停火开始以来，已有 100 多套因美国和以色列袭击而被埋在洞穴和掩体中的系统被回收。此外，据官员告诉《纽约时报》，一些美国评估认为，伊朗可能收回多达 70% 的战前导弹库存，这些导弹同样被埋在袭击其掩体和仓库后的废墟中。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : The USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) and her Carrier Strike Group, who on Thursday hit 296-days at sea, surpassing the record for the longest deployed aircraft carrier since the end of the Cold War, has since transited the Suez Canal from the Eastern Mediterranean and is once again conducting operations in the Red Sea, in support of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), two defense officials tell the Associated Press. The Ford, which initially left the Red Sea in March, after suffering a severe ventilation fire that started in the ship’s laundry and resulted in damage to hundreds of berthings and other compartments, was expected to finally return to Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia after loitering for the last few weeks in the Eastern Mediterranean - with stops in Crete and Croatia. Though it appears that the carrier and its crew has yet again been ordered to remain on station near Iran until the arrival of the USS George H. W. Bush (CVN-77), who is currently taking the long way to the region around the Cape of Good Hope in Southern Africa. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender ：杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（CVN-78）及其航母打击群周四在海上停留了 296 天，打破了冷战结束以来航母最长部署时间的纪录。据两名国防官员告诉美联社，该航母打击群已从东地中海通过苏伊士运河，目前再次在红海执行任务，以支持美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）。福特号最初于 3 月离开红海，此前其舰上洗衣房发生严重通风火灾，导致数百个铺位和其他舱室受损。原本预计它在东地中海徘徊数周（期间停靠克里特岛和克罗地亚）后，最终将返回弗吉尼亚州的诺福克海军基地。但目前看来，该航母及其船员再次接到命令，需留在伊朗附近海域待命，直到乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）抵达。布什号目前正绕道非洲南部的好望角前往该地区。推文
